items: D5 Enter single-cell branch: selection !== null && isSingleCell(selection) — if user has activeCell but no selection, Enter falls through to G-002. Spec explicit (D5) — implemented as-is. Future UX consideration: may want explicit activeCell-without-selection Enter→edit fallback.
D6 IME guard: e.nativeEvent.isComposing — React.KeyboardEvent.nativeEvent is global KeyboardEvent which has isComposing: boolean. tsc confirmed clean.
e.key as unknown as TCell — unknown bridge pattern, not as any (C-4 compliant, spec Section 8.4 explicitly approved).
C-29 spread-skip pattern applied for all 5 optional props in UseKeyboardEditProps (stories demonstrate isEditableColumn, onDeleteRange, onBulkEdit, onEditStart spread-skip).
